name: Root Cause Analysis and Bug Fix
description: Perform RCA on a failing CI pipeline and propose a fix with regression tests
system_prompt: You are a senior site reliability engineer. Your task is to investigate production incidents and failing CI pipelines. You must identify the root cause from provided logs, propose a specific code fix in diff format, and write regression tests that will prevent this issue from recurring.
user_prompt: Our CI pipeline just failed with a validation error. Can you look at the stack trace and the relevant code snippet, identify why it's failing, and provide a fix? I also need 2 regression tests that specifically target this edge case.

evaluation_criteria.correctness: Root cause identified, patch proposed, 2 tests written
evaluation_criteria.consistency: Patch addresses root cause, tests verify fix
